description: Provide a reachable egress or compliant fetch path for the FI PeopleSoft guest CSCR endpoint, implement and verify deterministic result extraction, then enable Cal eProcure source 7b35ae03-78aa-4b38-9092-a1fb0fd42bf3.

comments.text: Access diagnosis corrected 2026-07-11: this is not a blanket VM/IP 403. https://caleprocure.ca.gov/pages/index.aspx returns 200 and sets AWSALB cookies; then /pages/Events-BS3/event-search.aspx returns 200. A direct deep link without session bootstrap returns 403. suppliers.fiscal.ca.gov:165.235.74.141 times out directly, so scanner should use the Cal eProcure InFlight front-end proxy and preserve its session. Source metadata updated accordingly.

title: Enable automated Cal eProcure scanning from Garden VM
